properties.name: Lund Central Station
properties.note: Arrived via Skånetrafiken from Malmö (~60 SEK, 15 min)

properties.name: Lund Cathedral (Domkyrkan)
properties.note: 12th-century Romanesque cathedral — arrived after 15:00, missed clock show

properties.name: Finn the Giant (Crypt)
properties.note: Stone figure trapped in the cathedral crypt, hugging a pillar

properties.name: Kulturkvadranten
properties.note: Tiny, colourful, crooked houses from the 1800s — most photogenic area

properties.name: Lund University (Universitetsplatsen)
properties.note: Majestic stone campus — old-world academic grandeur

properties.name: Kebab Shop (Iftar Spot)
properties.note: ⚠ Plan B after seafood was too expensive. First kebab place was closed. Burger + Kyllinge Durum + Smakens Poesi Mango & Morot

properties.name: Street Bench (Iftar Seating)
properties.note: ❄ No indoor seating at the kebab shop. Ate on a freezing street bench at ~-1°C

properties.name: Espresso House (Fika)
properties.note: ☕ Semla Roll + Kanelbulle + Caramel Frappé. The warm rescue after freezing Iftar

properties.name: Restaurang Stäket (Planned, Not Visited)
properties.note: 🚫 Original Iftar plan — 15th-century cellar, Swedish seafood. Skipped: too expensive
